heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly to partly sunny. Highs in the low to mid 70s, some upper 60s far north. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear. Lows in the mid to upper 40s, with some lower 50s in the broad northwestern valleys, and upper 30s to mid 40s northeast and in the Adirondacks. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph early then becoming light and variable.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly sunny. Highs from the mid 70s to around 80. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph.
